message:
fix(util): preserve blank lines in implicit descriptions and trim dependency whitespace

Fix markdown import to keep blank lines within implicit description
blocks instead of clearing them on each non-empty line. Trim whitespace
from dependency type and id parts when parsing colon-separated
dependency strings, preventing silent mismatches. Add a test case for
whitespace-tolerant dependency parsing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
